svg.title: SlimZero request lifecycle flowchart
svg.desc: Flowchart showing every decision point from raw user prompt to final response, including the semantic guard rejection branch and hallucination flagging

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Intent Extractor parse the prompt?')
sendPrompt('How does T5-small rewrite the prompt locally?')
sendPrompt('Why is the semantic guard the only non-bypassable stage?')
sendPrompt('What does it mean to use the original prompt when the rewrite is rejected?')
sendPrompt('How does few-shot ranking work in SlimZero?')
sendPrompt('How does SlimZero pre-condition the LLM to respond minimally?')
sendPrompt('How does the Token Budget Enforcer trim in priority order?')
sendPrompt('Why is the LLM API call the only point where tokens are spent?')
sendPrompt('How does the response validator detect off-task responses?')
sendPrompt('What patterns does the hallucination flagger look for?')
sendPrompt('What data does the savings logger record per call?')
